return(function(...)local H={"\107\079\113\105\083\054\101\074\118\097\119\101\078\090\071\056","\056\067\057\049\050\077\118\068";"\074\054\083\086\110\066\043\088\107\107\090\079\110\054\097\066";"\052\120\119\072\081\105\071\101\085\099\081\113\081\076\102\065";"";"\110\104\071\075\052\104\113\061","\077\115\111\054\109\065\088\078","\074\077\100\065\055\054\099\077";"\113\113\088\101\074\105\110\067\110\054\067\106\048\066\097\114\089\098\061\061","\097\119\066\067\118\073\110\049\043\105\086\081\077\104\102\077\048\048\061\061","\103\115\056\111\107\097\089\047","\081\104\097\075\110\054\083\061";"\052\104\097\056";"\085\053\081\054\081\119\070\072\097\087\067\101\048\090\089\086\089\048\061\061";"\056\051\114\103";"\066\071\116\101\088\106\061\061","\078\107\043\087\113\099\043\121\074\066\097\117\054\054\117\106\052\048\061\061","\072\067\105\104\087\049\111\061";"\057\047\070\071\099\109\100\113";"\108\117\053\053\121\076\098\061","\088\078\098\061";"\085\087\078\105\083\067\110\090\110\050\061\061";"\075\066\087\043\056\089\107\051\065\078\067\061";"\097\073\098\072\043\087\055\077\043\105\081\087\078\105\101\069\074\050\061\061";"\108\114\107\114\080\075\116\050";"\048\054\086\121\097\105\081\105\108\071\116\073\108\087\071\073\078\106\061\061","\043\113\068\099\052\105\082\077\110\099\102\118\043\113\082\097";"\086\077\067\115\082\111\098\061","\051\098\090\065\097\065\066\087\107\078\088\098\043\109\086\076";"\118\090\070\099\108\053\090\085\110\057\110\104\110\107\081\071";"\104\088\074\067\120\106\082\089";"\069\053\048\114\117\089\066\054\087\080\080\103\106\048\061\061","\077\097\097\072\089\054\102\100\089\097\055\113\110\057\102\111\108\048\061\061","\081\105\081\107\043\067\105\072\107\071\081\071\110\113\078\116","\052\054\071\105\074\050\061\061","\053\072\080\102\077\066\055\112";"\086\043\116\112\099\089\113\061";"\070\081\118\107\117\099\051\089\079\050\061\061";"\068\113\085\076\102\112\122\120\071\106\061\061";"\083\053\097\117\052\057\081\090";"\043\053\117\078\089 return(function(H,q,E,G,p,a,X,S,v,f,V,e,A,z,I,F,k,u,j,T,w,Z,M,c)k,M,f,T,V,w,j,A,c,F,v,u,S,e,I,Z,z=function(H,i)local q=Z(i)local E=function(E,G,p,a,X,e,F)return w(H,{E,G,p,a,X;e;F},i,q)end return E end,function(H,i)local q=Z(i)local E=function(E,G,p,a,X)return w(H,{E,G;p;a,X},i,q)end return E end,function(H,i)local q=Z(i)local E=function(E,G)return w(H,{E,G},i,q)end return E end,function(H,i)local q=Z(i)local E=function(...)return w(H,{...},i,q)end return E end,function(H)local i,w=956562+(-1339659-(-383098)),H[276502-(((333208-872346)+-139515)+955154)]while w do
